introSection: Hot Tamales is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Casino Pier in Seaside Heights, New Jersey, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: During the 2016-2017 off-season, the pier was extended northwards to accommodate Hydrus. Many rides were moved around at this time and Hot Tamales moved from the pier's far southeast corner to more central location of the original pier.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Previously, the ride had blue track and silver supports. At some point between 2005 and 2007, it was repainted entirely white.

fullText:
Hot Tamales is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Casino Pier in Seaside Heights, New Jersey, USA.

During the 2016-2017 off-season, the pier was extended northwards to accommodate Hydrus. Many rides were moved around at this time and Hot Tamales moved from the pier's far southeast corner to more central location of the original pier.



Previously, the ride had blue track and silver supports. At some point between 2005 and 2007, it was repainted entirely white.
